creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 152291
Unified diff

Update to version 0.3.4.

Includes several bug fixes and a number of new scripts, most notably auto-pxe-installer-setup and auto-pxe-node-discover, which automate the setup of a FreeBSD PXE install server from any ISO image using bsdinstall and the rapid deployment and configuration of FreeBSD hosts over the network.
